blocked_reason: Stage 2 rework applied on 2026-03-24: order-update stream idempotency now uses stream message identity so filled updates are not skipped after acknowledged, the market-data reconnect path no longer crashes when the connect callback fires before service.ws is assigned, the dashboard renders Strategy1 runtime state plus live order tape, and the validation page includes a dedicated parity board plus session replay. After 16:15 IST, Strategy1 validation now prefers Angel historical one-minute candles for the selected trading day, falls back to retained market_ohlc_1m candles only if historical data is unavailable, and shows the selected candle source plus counts in the dashboard. Next required evidence is the first after-hours validation run against PineScript for BUY/SELL parity using the historical-backed replay source.
